title: SAP Programm- & Projektmanager S/4HANA Transformation (w/m/x)
required_skills: Stakeholder management up to top management
Consulting or IT service provider background
bonus_skills: Classical and agile project management methods
Client growth identification and business development
matched_skills: Programme coordination (HSBC: 6-workstream digital transformation, C-suite reporting)
Stakeholder management across functions and executive levels (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd)
Agile delivery — sprint planning, stand-ups, retrospectives (Hapag-Lloyd)
Budget tracking and financial governance (HSBC: USD 8M programme)
Status reporting and project transparency (HSBC burn-rate dashboards)
missing_skills: SAP ERP / SAP S/4HANA hands-on implementation experience
Consulting or IT service provider professional background
Large-scale SAP rollout or transformation programme leadership
PMP / PRINCE2 / SAP PM methodology certification
core_responsibilities: Plan, steer and deliver SAP S/4HANA transformation, implementation and rollout projects
Coordinate interdisciplinary project teams, business units and stakeholders up to top management
Ensure transparency on time, budget and quality for complex SAP programmes
Identify optimisation and growth potential with existing clients
Contribute PM methodology expertise to the internal delivery community
recommended_emphasis: HSBC: Managed 6-workstream USD 8M digital transformation with C-suite reporting and cross-functional coordination
Hapag-Lloyd: Agile sprint coordination across product, engineering and stakeholder teams
Power BI PL-300 certification and JIRA/Confluence proficiency — relevant to SAP programme reporting stack
Multi-language capability (German B1, English C1, Chinese C2) valuable in NTT DATA international client teams
summary: Boru scores 38.5 (weak match) — this is the Stuttgart posting of the same NTT DATA role as the Ettlingen position (job_id 4418326365). The identical JD means the same assessment applies: strong transferable PM coordination and budget governance skills exist, but the deep SAP ERP/S4HANA implementation expertise and consulting background required are absent. Apply only if willing to position strongly on transferable programme management credentials while acknowledging the SAP learning curve.
